examples.title: C: Reverse a Singly Linked List
examples.description: Iterative approach to reverse the list in place

examples.title: Python: Reverse a Singly Linked List
examples.description: Iterative approach to reverse the list in place
examples.code:
def reverse(self):
 prev = None
 current = self.head
 
 while current:
 next_node = current.next # Save next
 current.next = prev # Reverse link
 prev = current # Move prev
 current = next_node # Move current
 
 self.head = prev

def reverse_recursive(self, node):
 if node is None or node.next is None:
 self.head = node
 return node
 
 self.reverse_recursive(node.next)
 node.next.next = node
 node.next = None

examples.title: Java: Reverse a Singly Linked List
examples.description: Iterative approach to reverse the list in place

examples.title: C: Find Middle Element
examples.description: Using slow and fast pointer technique

examples.title: Python: Find Middle Element
examples.description: Using slow and fast pointer technique
examples.code:
def find_middle(self):
 if self.head is None:
 return None
 
 slow = self.head
 fast = self.head
 
 while fast and fast.next:
 slow = slow.next
 fast = fast.next.next
 
 return slow.data # or return slow for the node

# For even length list, returns second middle element
# 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 returns 3
# 1 -> 2 -> 3 -> 4 -> 5 returns 3
